title: Minecraft but upside down
body:
![  ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be66d904af10aaa79b8b57cf9e098667d56abeae.png)

**You can use the resourcepack for Minecraft to look like this**


Whenever you join a world you will spawn under a dirt block (in the end endston, in the nether a nether portal)


In order to jump you need to press shift


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/D7vqTrL8NDw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
